summary: Post-refactoring regression test completed successfully. All 12 features tested and working correctly after the major App.js refactoring (~2100 lines split into ~20 separate component files).
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all 7 sections: Hero, ViralFeatures, RepoOfTheDay, TopicsGrid, TrendingSection, CommunityStacks/FounderStacks, NewsletterSignup
Header navigation: Sign in with Google button present (data-testid='login-btn')
Dead Tool Detector page loads with title, input textarea, and submit button
Stack Generator page loads with title, input textarea, and submit button
Roast My Stack page loads with tool chips (Notion, Slack, etc.) and submit button
Repo Translator page loads with GitHub URL input and submit button
Your Idea Exists page loads with idea input and submit button
Tools page loads with 100 tool cards and working search functionality
Collections page loads with 6 collection cards
Topics page: clicking AI Agents topic navigates to /topics/ai-agents and shows 25 tools
Trending section tabs (Top this week, Today, This month, New & rising) switch content correctly
Newsletter signup form present at bottom of homepage with email input and submit button
All feature cards in ViralFeatures section navigate to correct pages
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed for public pages. Google OAuth is Emergent-managed.
seed_data_creation: None - app calls POST /api/seed on mount to ensure data exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 requested features verified working after major refactoring. Key data-testids confirmed working: hero-title, hero-search-input, hero-search-btn, nav-collections, nav-tools, login-btn, dead-tool-title, dead-tool-input, dead-tool-submit, stack-gen-title, stack-gen-input, stack-gen-submit, roast-title, tool-chip-notion, roast-submit, repo-translator-title, repo-url-input, repo-translate-submit, idea-exists-title, idea-input, idea-submit, tools-page-title, tools-search, collections-title, topic-title, tab-top_week, tab-top_day, newsletter-email, newsletter-submit, feature-dead-tool, feature-idea-exists, feature-roast, feature-repo-translator, feature-founders. All navigation flows working correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Refactoring was successful.
